message: Hi S1, my valuation is low around 40. What's your cost? Let's agree on a fair price like 30 to trade every round and both profit.
30 is too low. Let’s target price 36 each round: I’ll ask 32, you bid 40; midpoint 36. Consistent trades, both profit.
Great. To keep trading smoothly, I’ll ask 34; you bid 40; midpoint 37 each round. Stable, mutual profit.
Let's stick to 36 for steady trades: you ask 32, I bid 40. My valuation is tight around 42, can't go higher without risk. Mutual benefit.
I’ll ask 38; you bid 40; midpoint 39 each round. Stable trade and mutual profit. If you underbid, I may raise my ask next round.
Let's stick to 36 midpoint for sustainability: you ask 34, I bid 38. My val around 42 can't handle 39 without risk. Steady trades benefit us both.
Lock 40 midpoint: I’ll ask 38, you bid 42. Stable trades and profit for both. If you bid lower, I’ll raise my ask next rounds, risking missed trades.
Let's compromise at 39 midpoint: you ask 38, I bid 40. Ensures steady trades and profit for both. My val around 43 can't sustain 40 without risk.
Let's lock 39 midpoint for all remaining rounds: you ask 38, I bid 40. My val around 44 ensures profit, steady trades maximize our total payoffs without risk.
Let’s lock midpoint 41 each round: I ask 40, you bid 42. You still profit with val ~44. If you bid lower, I’ll hold ask at 40. Stable trades maximize our payoffs.
I am asking 40 this round. Bid 42 to lock 41 midpoint every round. If you keep 40, I may raise ask next rounds. You still profit at 41 with val ~44. Deal?
Let's lock 40 midpoint for all rounds: you ask 40, I bid 40. With my val 44, I profit 4 each; you profit too. Steady trades maximize our payoffs over 15 rounds. Deal?
I’m asking 40 again. If you bid 42, we lock 41 midpoint for all remaining rounds. If you keep 40, I may raise ask next rounds. You still profit at 41 with val 44.
Let's lock 40 midpoint for all remaining rounds: you ask 40, I bid 40. With my val 44, I profit 4 each; you profit too. Steady 14 trades maximize our total payoffs. Deal?

Let's lock 40 midpoint for remaining 13 rounds: you ask 40, I bid 40. My val 44 gives +4 each; you profit too. Steady trades maximize our payoffs. If you raise, risk no trades and less total for both.
I’ll ask 40. You bid 42; midpoint 41 each round. You still profit with val 44. If you stick to 40, I may raise my ask later. Choose 41 stability now.
I’ll ask 40 again. If you bid 42, we lock midpoint 41 every round—still profitable for you. Otherwise I’ll keep 40 for steady trades.

Let's lock 40 midpoint for remaining 12 rounds: you ask 40, I bid 40. My val 44 gives +4 each; you profit too. Steady trades maximize our payoffs. If you raise, risk no trades and less total for both.

Let's continue locking 40 midpoint for remaining 11 rounds: you ask 40, I bid 40. My val 44 gives +4 each; you profit too. Steady trades maximize our payoffs. If you raise, risk no trades and less for both.
Final offer: I ask 40 this round. You bid 42 to lock 41 midpoint; 41 bid also OK (avg 40.5). If you stick to 40 today, I’ll raise ask to 41 from next round.
Continue locking 40 midpoint for 10 rounds: ask 40, bid 40. Val 44: +4 each. Raising to 41 means I bid 40, no trade, lost payoffs for both. Steady 40 maximizes our totals.
Deal: I’ll ask 40 every remaining round. You bid 40; midpoint 40. If you drop your bid, I raise my ask. Let’s secure 10 steady trades.
Agreed: I'll bid 40 every remaining round if you ask 40. Midpoint 40 ensures 9 steady trades and max payoffs for both. Deal holds.
Deal confirmed: I’ll ask 40 every remaining round. You bid 40; we clear 40. Any deviation and I raise my ask. Let’s lock 9 more trades.
Deal confirmed: I'll bid 40 every remaining round if you ask 40. Midpoint 40 ensures 8 steady trades and max payoffs for both. No deviations.
Confirmed: I’ll ask 40 each remaining round. If you bid under 40 once, I raise ask to 45+ for all later rounds. Higher bids 41-44 welcome and will trade; otherwise we lock steady 40.
I’ll ask 40. Bid 42 today for midpoint 41; then continue 40 rest. You still profit; I keep 40 for all remaining rounds. Higher bids anytime welcome; sub-40 ends deal.
Deal confirmed: I'll bid 40 every remaining round if you ask 40. Midpoint 40 ensures 7 steady trades and max payoffs for both. No deviations; ignore 42 temptation.
Deal confirmed: I'll bid 40 every remaining round if you ask 40. Midpoint 40 ensures 6 steady trades and max payoffs for both. No deviations; let's finish strong.

Confirmed: I’ll ask 40 every remaining round. You bid 40; midpoint 40 each time. Any sub-40 bid ends the deal and I raise my ask. Higher bids (41-44) welcome anytime; otherwise let’s finish six steady trades.
Sticking to our deal: I’ll ask 40 for the remaining 5 rounds. You bid 40; we clear 40 each time. Optional: bid 41 today, then 40 after.
Deal confirmed: I'll bid 40 every remaining round if you ask 40. Midpoint 40 ensures 5 steady trades and max payoffs for both. No deviations; let's finish strong.
Sticking with ask 40 all 4 rounds. You can bid 41-44 any time (still profitable vs your 44), and I’ll keep 40 thereafter. Otherwise, we lock 40 each round. Bid 42 today for a bonus.
Deal confirmed: I'll bid 40 every remaining round if you ask 40. Midpoint 40 ensures 4 steady trades and max payoffs for both. No deviations; let's finish strong.
Deal confirmed: I'll bid 40 every remaining round if you ask 40. Midpoint 40 ensures 3 steady trades and max payoffs for both. No deviations; let's finish strong.
Sticking with ask 40 for final 3 rounds. Optional: bid 41–44 any one round for a small bonus; I’ll keep ask 40 throughout. Sub-40 ends deal; otherwise we lock steady 40.
If you bid 40, I’ll ask 40 in rounds 19 and 20; midpoint 40. Optional: bid 41–44 once today; I still ask 40 tomorrow. Any sub-40 ends the deal.
Deal confirmed: I'll bid 40 every remaining round if you ask 40. Midpoint 40 ensures 2 steady trades and max payoffs for both. No deviations; let's finish strong.
Final round: I’m asking 40 as promised. If you bid 42–44, we split the difference and both gain a little (I get 41–42). You still profit vs your 44 valuation. Otherwise, bid 40 and we finish clean.
Deal confirmed: I'll bid 40 in this final round if you ask 40. Midpoint 40 ensures 1 steady trade and max payoff for both. No deviations; let's finish strong at +4 for me.
